memory.description: Offline / air-gapped variant of the Memory MCP knowledge graph. Pins to a vendored package and writes the graph to a local file under the repo (or a path you control), so no network egress and no shared state. Use this in regulated environments where the default `npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-memory` invocation cannot reach the registry and where the knowledge graph must not leave the machine.
notes: Vendor the server: `npm pack @modelcontextprotocol/server-memory` then unpack to ./vendor/mcp-server-memory.
Create ./.copilot/memory/ and add it to .gitignore if the graph is sensitive.
No network calls are made; the knowledge graph is a single JSON file you can audit, back up, and rotate.
Do NOT enable this server alongside the online `memory` server — pick one to avoid divergent graphs.
